title: LQHP: Low-Quality Horror Project
description: Add some unnecessary spook to your world!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1ralqN0VrrY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Low-Quality Horror Project, or LQHP, is a datapack/mod that adds a few spooky things to your Minecraft World.

**_I can't see anything!_**
- one of the features of LQHP is that it adds some generic dense fog to the overworld.
- if you are using shaders that already do this, or just find this annoying, there's a version without this feature

**_Who built this stuff?_**
- adds a variety of decorative structures
- These can range from a simple crafting table that you didn't place
- to an unlikely patch of bedrock
- to recreations of old bugs, like large stone monoliths
- and there's some classic stuff like pyramids and 2x2 tunnels

**_Did i just see something?_**
- adds quite a few random events (every 5-20 minutes)
- This could range from spontaneous combustion or a note left in your inventory
- to a weird armor stand appearing behind you
- to something watching you in the distance
- to the day passing faster than usual...

**And More!**

(recommended singleplayer with music turned off)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This is a datapack developed in about 3 and 1/2 days for a PMC jam, and ported over to Modrinth
Tested in singleplayer. will probably work in multiplayer, but im not sure
